mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_comment (order_no, product_id, user_id, user_name, rating, content, images) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{productId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{images})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_comment WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_comment WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE product_comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product_comment SET reply = #{reply}, reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star5, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star4, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star3, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star2, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star1 FROM product_comment WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM product_comment WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM product_comment WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
